simple_answer: Notice period is the time you or the employer must give before ending the job. It affects resignation, final settlement, and smooth transition.
red_flags: Employee notice much longer than employer notice
practical_advice: Check if notice buyout is allowed
Compare employee and employer notice periods

simple_answer: Termination explains when the company or employee can end employment and whether notice, warning, or compensation is required.
practical_advice: Check if written notice is mandatory
Confirm compensation in lieu of notice
Look for appeal or review process
user_questions: Can the company terminate me without warning?

simple_answer: Payment terms define how much is paid, when payment happens, delay penalties, taxes, and refund conditions.

simple_answer: Liability defines who is responsible if financial loss, legal issues, or service failure happens.

simple_answer: Confidentiality prevents sensitive information from being shared outside the agreed purpose.
